name: material-inventory-management-system
description: Material Inventory Management System for Construction Companies

scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.build: cd backend && npm install && npx prisma generate && npm run build
scripts.start: cd backend && npx prisma db push --accept-data-loss && node dist/prisma/seed.js && node dist/server.js

author: AVINASH KANAPARTHI INFRA PRIVATE LIMITED
